title: Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks
description: A magic mod bringing back the classic RPG spellcasting fantasy. (irons spells and spellbooks)
body:
![Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-NeoForge-ecebe6?labelColor=B446C6&style=for-the-badge)![Available](https://img.shields.io/badge/Available-1.18.2%20%7C%201.19.2%20%7C%201.20.1%20%7C%201.21-ecebe6?labelColor=B446C6&style=for-the-badge)[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1104430139275743293.svg?label=&logo=discord&logoColor=ffffff&color=7389D8&labelColor=6A7EC2&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/TRzEdrndM2)[![Patreon](https://shields.io/badge/-Patreon-f86754?style=for-the-badge&logo=patreon&logoColor=white)](https://www.patreon.com/Iron431) ![Logo](https://iron431.github.io/Irons-Spellbooks-Docs/img/spellbooks-title-small-background.png) Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks introduces the classic RPG spellcasting fantasy to the game. Fight dangerous wizards, raid a plethora of structures, delve through dungeons, collect resources and spells, and find powerful magical artifacts! * * * ## Featuring: - Over 100 upgradable spells - 2 Spellcasting Bosses - 9 Spellcasting Enemies/Allies/Merchants - 12 wizard armor sets - 11 randomly generated structures - Weapon Imbuement and Armor Upgrade Systems - Extensive configuration options (including per-spell settings) - Native compatibility with JEI, JEED, Apotheosis, Tetra, Better Combat, Patchouli, and others! - And much more! * * * ## FAQ: Q: How do I get started with Spells 'n Spellbooks?
A: https://www.iron.wiki/progression/ Q: Will there be a port to 1.20.1 (or any other versions/modloader)
A: TLDR: No. These mods are a hobby project and development for a single version takes *months* of personal commitment. However, they are open-source and open to community contributions: https://github.com/iron431/. Early access is available on Patreon (https://www.patreon.com/Iron431) Q: My Models are are broken/won’t render
A: If you have Optifine, it’s that. Optifine is meant for vanilla clients. Use the many alternatives (such as Oculus) that work with forge * * * ![Tyros](https://iron.wiki/img/screenshots/echo_of_the_flamebearer.png) ![Inscription Table](https://iron.wiki/img/screenshots/inscription_table.png) ![Scroll Forge](https://iron.wiki/img/screenshots/scroll_forge.png) ![Scroll Forge](https://iron.wiki/img/screenshots/structures.png) ![Scroll Forge](https://iron.wiki/img/screenshots/magic_loot.png) ![Scroll Forge](https://iron.wiki/img/screenshots/ancient_city_loot.png) * * * ## For Developers: __[https://iron.wiki/developers](https://iron.wiki/developers)__ * * * ## Support: [![Patreon](https://shields.io/badge/-Patreon-f86754?style=for-the-badge&logo=patreon&logoColor=white)](https://www.patreon.com/Iron431) * * * [![Essential](https://iron.wiki/img/ad/essential.jpg)](https://essential.gg) [![Bisect](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/1b3bc821-298d-4efc-96d2-7dff77d7069a.png)](https://bisecthosting.com/iron)
